description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:latest Docker image and defining a MAVEN_OPTS variable to set the local repository to .m2/repository. Define three stages: build, test, and coverage, and configure a cache for .m2/repository, target/, and reports/. In the build stage add a build job that runs mvn dependency:go-offline. In the test stage add a test job that runs mvn org.jacoco:jacoco-maven-plugin:prepare-agent install -Pcoverage-per-test. In the coverage stage add a coverage job that runs mvn sonar:sonar -Dsonar.host.url=$SONAR_HOST -Dsonar.organization=$SONAR_ORG -Dsonar.login=$SONAR_KEY.
